entry.title: EU-backed green bonds risk financing Chinese clean tech in third countries
entry.summary: The EU has launched a €15-20bn green investment fund to boost sustainable projects, but a good share of the money is set to go towards buying Chinese clean technologies – including the same high-risk power inverters Brussels is trying to phase out.
entry.content:

entry.title: 2026年公共フォーラムの提案提出期限が6月17日まで延長
